title: OHIF pluginConfig.json
description: Build-time plugin declaration for platform/app. Every extension/mode bundled into the viewer must be declared here; presence in the extensions/ or modes/ workspace folders alone does nothing.

packageName.description: npm package name of the extension or mode (also its OHIF id).

default.description: false keeps the plugin resolvable/bundled but not auto-registered at startup.

directory.description: Out-of-tree package root. Leading './' is repo-root-relative, leading '~' is home-relative, anything else is absolute. Use forward slashes.
Asset folder copied verbatim into dist. Same path grammar as plugin.directory.

importPath.description: URL/path passed to window.browserImportFunction for runtime import.

globalName.description: window global to read after importPath loads (UMD-style).

importName.description: Named export to use instead of default when globalName is not set.

to.description: Sub-path under dist to copy directory into, e.g. /dicom-microscopy-viewer/.
